wine_restaurants.name: Enoteca Pinchiorri
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Tuscan haute cuisine; tasting menus engineered around the cellar; pairing menus across five continents of wines
wine_restaurants.description: Three-Michelin-starred icon founded 1972 by Annie Feolde and Giorgio Pinchiorri, with a cellar of 100,000 bottles across 4,000 labels. Set in a 17th-century palazzo with formal dining and pairing menus from the cellar.

wine_restaurants.name: Osteria di Passignano
wine_restaurants.address: Via di Passignano 33, 50028 Badia a Passignano, Tavarnelle Val di Pesa, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Tuscan menus driven by the Antinori estate kitchen garden and the abbey cellars; comprehensive Antinori vertical programme
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant within the medieval Badia a Passignano abbey, run by the Antinori family. Chef Matteo Lorenzini's Tuscan menus pair against the abbey's 10th-century cellars; guided pairings from Tignanello and Solaia verticals.

wine_restaurants.name: Officina della Bistecca
wine_restaurants.address: Via XX Luglio 11, 50022 Panzano in Chianti, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Whole-animal beef tasting menus by butcher-chef Dario Cecchini; communal seating with Chianti Classico-led pairing programme
wine_restaurants.description: Upstairs from the Antica Macelleria Cecchini in Panzano, with one long communal table. Butcher-chef Dario Cecchini's fixed-format beef menu paired with grower Chianti Classico from the surrounding hills.

verified.address_quoted: Via XX Luglio, 11, 50022 Panzano In Chianti FI

wine_restaurants.name: Il Latini
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Classical Tuscan trattoria; Florentine steak and ribollita with Tuscan-anchored wine list across Super Tuscan and Chianti Classico labels
wine_restaurants.description: Family-run Tuscan institution founded 1911 on Via dei Palchetti, now in its fourth generation in the Palazzo Rucellai. House Sangiovese carafes alongside a serious Super Tuscan cellar.

wine_restaurants.name: Cibreo Ristorante
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Tuscan-driven menus from chef Fabio Picchi; rotating Tuscan-anchored cellar list with deep Chianti Classico and Sangiovese verticals
wine_restaurants.description: Founded in the 1980s by Fabio Picchi, anchored on traditional Tuscan ingredients from the Sant'Ambrogio market. The list pairs against rustic dishes including ribollita, peposo and trippa alla fiorentina.

wine_restaurants.name: La Bottega del 30
wine_restaurants.address: Via di Santa Caterina 2, 53019 Villa a Sesta, Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Refined Tuscan tasting menus driven by garden produce; cellar weighted toward Chianti Classico and Brunello di Montalcino verticals
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred Chianti Classico restaurant in the hamlet of Villa a Sesta, owned by chef Helene Stoquelet. Tuscan tasting menus paired with growers from neighbouring estates Felsina and Castell'in Villa.

verified.address_quoted: Via di Santa Caterina 2, 53019 Villa a Sesta

wine_restaurants.name: Buca dell'Orafo
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Florentine cuisine in a 13th-century palazzo cellar; Tuscan-led wine list anchored by Chianti and grower Sangiovese
wine_restaurants.description: Florentine buca since 1945 in a vaulted goldsmith's cellar by the Ponte Vecchio. Signature ribollita and artichoke frittata paired from a Tuscan-led cellar built across grower Chianti Classico and Vin Santo.

wine_restaurants.name: Il Poggio Rosso
wine_restaurants.address: Localita San Felice, 53019 Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Tuscan gourmet menus driven by the San Felice estate; pairing menu mining the 500-label cellar across Tuscan classics
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant inside Borgo San Felice in Castelnuovo Berardenga, with a 500-label cellar built around Chianti Classico Riserva and the San Felice Vigorello Super Tuscan.

wine_restaurants.name: La Sala dei Grappoli
wine_restaurants.address: Castello di Poggio alle Mura 1, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Refined modern Tuscan cuisine with menus paired entirely from the Banfi estate cellar plus producer rotation across Brunello consortium
wine_restaurants.description: Castello Banfi's flagship restaurant inside the 14th-century castle at Poggio alle Mura. Estate-driven menus from chef Domenico Francone, paired exclusively from Banfi and curated Brunello producer verticals.

verified.address_quoted: Castello di Poggio alle Mura, 1, Montalcino, Italy 53024

wine_restaurants.name: Campo del Drago
wine_restaurants.address: Localita Castiglion del Bosco, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Tuscan haute cuisine; pairing menus from the Castiglion del Bosco Brunello vertical plus consortium roster
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant at Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco. Menus driven by Val d'Orcia produce, paired with the estate Brunello di Montalcino verticals across multiple vintages.

wine_restaurants.name: Trattoria Enrico Bartolini at L'Andana
wine_restaurants.address: Localita Badiola, 58043 Castiglione della Pescaia, Italy
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Maremma cuisine from Enrico Bartolini's kitchen team; pairing programme of Maremma DOC reds and Bolgheri Superiore
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant at L'Andana resort in the Maremma. Menus driven by hyper-local Maremma produce paired with the Acquagiusta estate plus Bolgheri and Morellino di Scansano producer verticals.

wine_restaurants.name: Osteria del Cinghiale Bianco
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Tuscan trattoria menus driven by wild boar specialties; Chianti Classico and Bolgheri pairing programme
wine_restaurants.description: Set inside a 14th-century tower on Borgo San Jacopo with vaulted stone dining rooms. Pappardelle al cinghiale and Tuscan ragu paired against a 350-label cellar of Chianti Classico and Bolgheri reds.
